name: gameq2
creator: wperez274
description: simple game. key [Backspace] = Pause/ Resume Warning: The more you move left and right, the more points you get, but the more energy is used or loss. The energy loss is low but it’s there. Reason why I put that is because, in reality, the more you move, the more energy (Carbs & Calories / Heat) your body uses. So move wisely :-) Only move when you have to. Good luck!
